description: React 16 から React 18 への移行

old_entries.content: Project uses React 16.14 for the frontend. We rely on class components and lifecycle methods like componentDidMount.

new_entries.content: Migrated frontend to React 18.2. Now using functional components with hooks. Concurrent rendering enabled. StrictMode updated for React 18 compatibility.

query: What version of React is the project currently using?

description: REST から GraphQL への変更

old_entries.content: The API uses REST endpoints. GET /users, POST /users, PUT /users/:id, DELETE /users/:id are the main routes.

new_entries.content: Switched API to GraphQL using Apollo Server. REST endpoints deprecated. Single /graphql endpoint for all queries and mutations.

query: What API style does the project use?

description: JWT から セッションベース認証への変更

old_entries.content: Authentication uses JWT tokens. Tokens expire after 1 hour. Refresh tokens stored in localStorage.

new_entries.content: Replaced JWT with session-based authentication. Sessions stored server-side with Redis. Cookie-based session management. 24-hour session expiry.

query: How does the current authentication system work?

description: MySQL から PostgreSQL へのデータベース移行

old_entries.content: Database is MySQL 8.0 running on RDS. Using InnoDB engine. Database host: mysql-prod.internal:3306.

new_entries.content: Migrated from MySQL to PostgreSQL 15 on RDS. Using pgvector extension for vector search. Database host: postgres-prod.internal:5432.

query: What database does the project currently use?

description: AWS から GCP へのクラウド移行

old_entries.content: Infrastructure hosted on AWS. Using EC2 for compute, S3 for storage, CloudFront for CDN. Region: us-east-1.

new_entries.content: Migrated cloud infrastructure to Google Cloud Platform. Using GKE for Kubernetes, Cloud Storage for object storage, Cloud CDN. Region: us-central1.

query: Which cloud provider does the project currently use?

description: npm から pnpm へのパッケージマネージャ変更

old_entries.content: Project uses npm for package management. package-lock.json is tracked in version control. Node version: 16.

new_entries.content: Switched package manager from npm to pnpm for faster installs and disk space efficiency. pnpm-lock.yaml replaces package-lock.json. Node version: 20.

query: What package manager does the project use?

description: Jest から Vitest へのテストフレームワーク変更

old_entries.content: Testing framework is Jest 29 with ts-jest for TypeScript support. Test files use .test.ts extension. Coverage via jest --coverage.

new_entries.content: Migrated test suite from Jest to Vitest for native ESM support and faster execution. Configuration in vitest.config.ts. Coverage via vitest --coverage.

query: What testing framework does the project use?

description: Express から Fastify へのサーバー変更

old_entries.content: Backend server uses Express 4.18 with body-parser and cors middleware. Port 3000 in development.

new_entries.content: Replaced Express with Fastify 4 for better performance and TypeScript support. Schema validation with Zod. Port 3000 in development.

query: What web framework does the backend use?

description: モノリポから分離リポジトリへの構成変更

old_entries.content: Project is structured as a monorepo with frontend, backend, and shared packages in a single repository managed by Turborepo.

new_entries.content: Separated monorepo into three independent repositories: api-server, web-client, and shared-lib. Each has its own CI/CD pipeline.

query: How is the project repository currently structured?

description: docker-compose から Kubernetes へのデプロイ変更

old_entries.content: Production deployment uses docker-compose with 3 services: api, db, and redis. Deploy with docker-compose up -d.

new_entries.content: Migrated production deployment from docker-compose to Kubernetes. Helm charts in ./charts directory. Deploy with helm upgrade --install.

query: How is the production environment deployed?

description: CTO 交代

old_entries.content: The CTO is John Smith, who joined the company in 2019. John oversees all technical decisions and reports to the CEO.

new_entries.content: Sarah Chen has been appointed as the new CTO, effective March 2024. John Smith moved to an advisory role. Sarah brings 15 years of distributed systems experience.

query: Who is the current CTO?

description: オフィス移転

old_entries.content: The main office is located at 100 Market Street, San Francisco, CA 94105. Office hours are 9am-6pm PST.

new_entries.content: Relocated main office to 500 Howard Street, San Francisco, CA 94105 in January 2024. The new office has 30% more floor space and standing desks.

query: Where is the company's main office located?

description: リモートワークポリシー変更

old_entries.content: Company policy requires all employees to be in the office 5 days a week. No remote work is permitted except for medical reasons.

new_entries.content: Adopted hybrid work policy: employees are required to be in office on Tuesdays and Thursdays. Full remote work is allowed for the remaining days.

query: What is the current remote work policy?

description: Slack から Teams への移行

old_entries.content: Team communication is done via Slack. Main channels are #general, #engineering, #product, and #random.

new_entries.content: Company migrated from Slack to Microsoft Teams in February 2024. All channels have been recreated. Slack workspace will be archived by end of March 2024.

query: What communication tool does the team currently use?

description: Python 2 から Python 3 への移行

old_entries.content: Data pipeline scripts are written in Python 2.7. Using legacy libraries including print statements and urllib2.

new_entries.content: Fully migrated data pipeline to Python 3.11. Using type hints, f-strings, and asyncio. All Python 2 code has been removed.

query: What Python version are the data pipeline scripts using?

description: 開発リードの交代

old_entries.content: Alex Johnson leads the backend engineering team. Alex joined in 2020 and has been key to the microservices migration.

new_entries.content: Maria Garcia took over as backend engineering lead in Q1 2024 after Alex Johnson left to join a startup. Maria previously led the platform team.

query: Who leads the backend engineering team?

description: CI/CD ツール変更（Jenkins → GitHub Actions）

old_entries.content: CI/CD pipeline runs on Jenkins 2.387. Jenkins server hosted at jenkins.internal:8080. Pipelines defined in Jenkinsfile.

new_entries.content: Migrated CI/CD from Jenkins to GitHub Actions. Workflows defined in .github/workflows/. Jenkins server decommissioned in December 2023.

query: What CI/CD system does the project use?

description: Jira から Linear への移行

old_entries.content: Project management and issue tracking is handled via Jira. Board URL: company.atlassian.net. Sprint length is 2 weeks.

new_entries.content: Switched issue tracking from Jira to Linear in October 2023 for better developer experience. All historical issues migrated. Sprint length remains 2 weeks.

query: What tool is used for project management and issue tracking?

description: Node.js バージョンアップ（14 → 20）

old_entries.content: The project runs on Node.js 14 LTS. .nvmrc file pins to node 14.21.3.

new_entries.content: Upgraded Node.js from 14 to 20 LTS. .nvmrc updated to 20.11.0. Node 14 reached end-of-life so the upgrade was required.

query: What Node.js version does the project use?

description: TypeScript バージョンアップ（4 → 5）

old_entries.content: Project uses TypeScript 4.9 with strict mode enabled. tsconfig.json targets ES2020.

new_entries.content: Upgraded to TypeScript 5.3. Now using const type parameters and decorators stable feature. tsconfig targets ES2022.

query: What TypeScript version is the project using?

description: 給与支払いサイクルの変更

old_entries.content: Employees are paid on the last business day of each month. Payroll is processed by the HR team using ADP.

new_entries.content: Payroll changed to bi-weekly schedule starting January 2024. Pay dates are every other Friday. Switched payroll provider from ADP to Gusto.

query: What is the current payroll schedule?

description: 健康保険プロバイダーの変更

old_entries.content: Company health insurance is provided through Aetna. Employees can choose from HMO or PPO plans. Open enrollment in October.

new_entries.content: Health insurance provider changed from Aetna to Blue Shield of California effective January 2024. New plans include HMO, PPO, and HDHP options.

query: Who is the current health insurance provider?

description: Kubernetes バージョンアップ

old_entries.content: Production Kubernetes cluster runs version 1.25. Managed via GKE. Cluster nodes use n2-standard-4 machine type.

new_entries.content: Kubernetes cluster upgraded to version 1.29. GKE autopilot mode enabled for cost optimization. Nodes upgraded to n2-standard-8.

query: What Kubernetes version is the production cluster running?

description: モニタリングツール変更（Datadog → Grafana Cloud）

old_entries.content: Application monitoring uses Datadog APM. Dashboards at app.datadoghq.com. Alerts configured for p99 latency and error rate.

new_entries.content: Replaced Datadog with Grafana Cloud for cost savings. Metrics via Prometheus, logs via Loki, traces via Tempo. Dashboards migrated to Grafana.

query: What monitoring solution does the team currently use?

description: 設計ツール変更（Sketch → Figma）

old_entries.content: UI design work is done in Sketch. Design files stored in Abstract for version control. Mac only workflow.

new_entries.content: Design team migrated from Sketch to Figma in Q3 2023. All design assets now in Figma with real-time collaboration. Abstract subscription cancelled.

query: What design tool does the team use?

description: プロダクトマネージャーの交代

old_entries.content: David Kim is the product manager for the core platform. He has been with the company since 2021 and owns the product roadmap.

new_entries.content: Emily Rodriguez joined as product manager for core platform in February 2024. David Kim was promoted to VP of Product. Emily comes from Stripe.

query: Who is the product manager for the core platform?

description: Stripe から Braintree への決済処理変更

old_entries.content: Payment processing is handled by Stripe. Using Stripe Checkout for the payment flow. Supports credit cards and Apple Pay.

new_entries.content: Migrated payment processing from Stripe to Braintree in January 2024 due to better international rates. Supports credit cards, PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay.

query: What payment processor does the platform use?

description: Go バージョンアップ（1.19 → 1.22）

old_entries.content: The microservices are written in Go 1.19. go.mod specifies go 1.19 as the minimum version.

new_entries.content: Upgraded Go runtime to 1.22. All go.mod files updated. Using new range-over-integer and improved for-range semantics.

query: What Go version are the microservices using?

description: CDN プロバイダー変更（CloudFront → Cloudflare）

old_entries.content: Static assets served via AWS CloudFront. Distribution ID: E1234ABCDEF. Cache TTL is 86400 seconds for static assets.

new_entries.content: CDN switched from CloudFront to Cloudflare in Q4 2023. Cloudflare Workers used for edge logic. Cache rules defined in _headers file.

query: Which CDN provider is currently being used?

description: ログ管理ツール変更（ELK → Grafana Loki）

old_entries.content: Log aggregation uses ELK stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana). Kibana dashboards available at kibana.internal:5601.

new_entries.content: Migrated log management from ELK stack to Grafana Loki. Promtail used for log shipping. ELK stack decommissioned in February 2024.

query: What log management system is in use?

description: Terraform バージョンアップ

old_entries.content: Infrastructure as code uses Terraform 1.3. State stored in S3 with DynamoDB locking. Provider registry at registry.terraform.io.

new_entries.content: Upgraded Terraform to 1.7. Migrated to OpenTofu for open-source compliance. State now stored in GCS with Firestore locking after cloud migration.

query: What IaC tool and version is the team using?

description: エンジニアリングVP就任

old_entries.content: Robert Taylor serves as VP of Engineering. He joined the company in 2018 and has scaled the team from 5 to 40 engineers.

new_entries.content: Robert Taylor departed in December 2023 to pursue other opportunities. Lisa Wang was promoted from Director to VP of Engineering effective January 2024.

query: Who is the current VP of Engineering?

description: OKR から SPACE メトリクスへのパフォーマンス評価変更

old_entries.content: Engineering performance is measured using OKRs. Quarterly OKR reviews are conducted. Individual OKRs aligned to company objectives.

new_entries.content: Shifted to SPACE metrics framework for engineering performance in 2024. Measuring Satisfaction, Performance, Activity, Communication, and Efficiency. OKRs retained at company level only.

query: What framework is used to measure engineering performance?

description: Confluence から Notion へのドキュメント管理変更

old_entries.content: Team documentation is maintained in Confluence. Space URL: company.atlassian.net/wiki. Architecture Decision Records stored in Engineering space.

new_entries.content: Documentation migrated from Confluence to Notion in September 2023. All engineering docs, ADRs, and runbooks moved to Notion workspace.

query: Where is the team documentation stored?

description: Redis から Valkey への移行

old_entries.content: Caching layer uses Redis 7.0 on ElastiCache. Session storage and rate limiting implemented with Redis. Connected via redis.internal:6379.

new_entries.content: Migrated from Redis to Valkey 7.2, the open-source Redis fork, following license changes. API-compatible so no code changes needed. Running on Memorystore.

query: What caching system is the application using?

description: セキュリティポリシー変更（MFA 必須化）

old_entries.content: Multi-factor authentication is optional for all employee accounts. Employees are encouraged but not required to enable MFA.

new_entries.content: MFA is now mandatory for all employee accounts effective January 15, 2024. Accounts without MFA will be locked. TOTP or hardware keys accepted.

query: Is MFA required for employee accounts?

description: 採用プラットフォーム変更（Greenhouse → Ashby）

old_entries.content: Recruiting and hiring managed through Greenhouse ATS. Candidates apply at company.greenhouse.io. Recruiters use Greenhouse for scheduling.

new_entries.content: Switched ATS from Greenhouse to Ashby in Q1 2024. Better analytics and scheduling automation. Job postings now at jobs.ashbyhq.com/company.

query: What applicant tracking system does HR use?

description: メッセージキュー変更（RabbitMQ → Pub/Sub）

old_entries.content: Async messaging uses RabbitMQ 3.11. Queues defined in rabbitmq.config. Consumer services use AMQP protocol on port 5672.

new_entries.content: Replaced RabbitMQ with Google Cloud Pub/Sub following the GCP migration. Topics and subscriptions managed via Terraform. Dead letter topics configured for failed messages.

query: What message queue system is the platform using?

description: CEO 交代

old_entries.content: Michael Brown is the CEO and co-founder. He has led the company since founding in 2015 and oversees overall strategy.

new_entries.content: Jennifer Liu was appointed as CEO in February 2024. Michael Brown transitioned to Executive Chairman. Jennifer previously served as COO and has been with the company since 2017.

query: Who is the current CEO of the company?

description: 本番環境リージョン変更

old_entries.content: Production services run in AWS us-east-1 (N. Virginia). Failover region is us-west-2 (Oregon). RTO is 4 hours.

new_entries.content: Production moved to GCP us-central1 (Iowa) after cloud migration. Secondary region is us-east1 (South Carolina). RTO improved to 1 hour with active-passive setup.

query: Which region does production currently run in?

description: Vue から React への UI フレームワーク変更

old_entries.content: Admin dashboard is built with Vue 2 and Vuex for state management. Components use Options API.

new_entries.content: Admin dashboard rewritten in React 18 with Zustand for state management. Vue 2 reached end-of-life, driving the migration. Completed in March 2024.

query: What UI framework is the admin dashboard built with?

old_entries.content: Platform SLA guarantees 99.9% uptime per month, allowing up to 43.8 minutes of downtime. SLA credits issued for violations.

new_entries.content: Upgraded SLA from 99.9% to 99.95% starting January 2024. Maximum allowed downtime reduced to 21.9 minutes per month. Enhanced monitoring enables faster incident response.

query: What is the current platform SLA?

description: Webpack から Vite へのビルドツール変更

old_entries.content: Frontend build toolchain uses Webpack 5. Build configuration in webpack.config.js. Hot module replacement enabled for development.

new_entries.content: Replaced Webpack with Vite 5 for significantly faster dev server startup and build times. Configuration in vite.config.ts. HMR improved dramatically.

query: What build tool does the frontend use?

description: リモートデスクトップツール変更（TeamViewer → Tailscale）

old_entries.content: Remote access to company resources uses TeamViewer. TeamViewer IDs shared via IT helpdesk for support sessions.

new_entries.content: Switched from TeamViewer to Tailscale for secure remote access in November 2023. Zero-trust networking with WireGuard encryption. All developers use Tailscale to access internal tools.

query: What tool is used for remote access to company resources?

description: Elasticsearch バージョンアップ

old_entries.content: Full-text search powered by Elasticsearch 7.17. Cluster has 3 nodes on EC2. Index aliases used for zero-downtime reindexing.

new_entries.content: Upgraded Elasticsearch from 7.17 to OpenSearch 2.12 following licensing changes. Migrated to managed OpenSearch Service on AWS. All indices migrated successfully.

query: What search engine does the platform use?

description: フロントエンドリード交代

old_entries.content: Tom Harris leads the frontend engineering team. Tom built the current React architecture and has been with the company since 2020.

new_entries.content: Priya Patel joined as frontend engineering lead in March 2024. Tom Harris moved to a principal engineer role focusing on performance. Priya previously worked at Airbnb.

query: Who leads the frontend engineering team?

description: データウェアハウス変更（Redshift → BigQuery）

old_entries.content: Analytics data warehouse is Amazon Redshift. Data loaded via AWS Glue ETL jobs. BI tool is Tableau connected to Redshift.

new_entries.content: Data warehouse migrated from Redshift to BigQuery following GCP migration. ETL jobs rewritten using Dataflow. Tableau replaced with Looker for BI.

query: What data warehouse does the analytics team use?

description: Java バージョンアップ（11 → 21）

old_entries.content: Legacy services run on Java 11 LTS with Spring Boot 2.7. JVM flags configured for G1GC garbage collector.

new_entries.content: Upgraded Java from 11 to 21 LTS across all services. Spring Boot updated to 3.2. Using ZGC garbage collector for lower latency. Virtual threads enabled.

query: What Java version are the legacy services using?

description: Stripe ポリシー変更（手数料体系）

old_entries.content: Subscription pricing model: Basic plan $9/month, Pro plan $29/month, Enterprise custom pricing. Annual billing offers 2 months free.

new_entries.content: Updated pricing: Starter plan $12/month, Growth plan $39/month, Scale plan $99/month, Enterprise custom. Annual billing now offers 20% discount. Effective March 2024.

query: What are the current subscription pricing tiers?

description: Python パッケージマネージャ変更（pip → uv）

old_entries.content: Python dependencies managed with pip and requirements.txt. Virtual environments created with venv. Dependency pinning done manually.

new_entries.content: Switched Python package management from pip to uv for 10x faster installs. pyproject.toml replaces requirements.txt. uv.lock for reproducible builds.

query: What tool manages Python dependencies currently?
